package.name: mbf_estimator
package.description:
Linear Kalman filter base-state estimator for the MBF quadruped.
Fuses IMU (orientation + linear acceleration + angular velocity) with leg kinematics (sensor_msgs/JointState reordered via Pinocchio) and per-foot contact estimates (geometry_msgs/WrenchStamped from mbf_se_bridge/grf_estimator) to produce base pose and twist in world.
18-state filter following the MIT Cheetah-Software / legged_control formulation: x = [ p_body(3); v_body(3); p_foot[0..3](3) ] (all in world) Body orientation is taken directly from sensor_msgs/Imu and is not part of the filter state.
Same node runs unmodified in Gazebo and on real hardware — the inputs (/joint_states, /imu/data, contact wrenches) are the same in both.
